content.full_text:
87100

Official Must Announce Conflict at the Time of

Disqualification

See 18700(b)(5).

sections.question_synthetic: Whether an official must announce their disqualification from a matter under the Political Reform Act.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: An official must announce their disqualification from a matter when required by law or ethics rules.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether an official must announce their disqualification from a matter under the Political Reform Act.

CONCLUSION: An official must announce their disqualification from a matter when required by law or ethics rules.

embedding.summary: FPPC advice letter 79-161 addressing whether officials must announce disqualification from matters under California's Political Reform Act.
